g.text: All six capacity markets use sloped administrative demand curves. Recovery basis drives mechanism presence; MISO localizes (boundary condition); ERCOT energy-only is the negative control. Price levels not equated (Methods).

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: The concentration-socialization mechanism recurs across six capacity markets; ERCOT (energy-only) is the negative control
